reviews.review_description: I do not know really what to say. I expected much more than mostly light show and space-time mysticism. Because of the end message I will give 4 stars.

What a beautiful presentation of our cosmos. Highly recommend this as a calming  meditation or existential panic attack - both reactions valid and fun for all. Ever wonder what it's like to ride a black hole through another black hole?

These experiences of space and our planet are fantastic and completely immersive. Never experienced anything like it but learnt a huge amount in short experiences from gravity, the planets, electromagnetic energy to black holes and waves all done with professional actors voices leading us through. One tip is to make sure you stand up with space around you so you can interact with the experiences.
These have to be paid reviews because this app is a piece of junk. It is not even visually pleasing, and it's super boring. Save your money!
This is more a question than a review... How do I select the chapters, or do anything? As soon as the app launches my controllers disappear and I can't do anything?!?!
Why doesn't it support crossbuy? It's not right to have to buy pc version again.

Sorry, I didn't get it.  The visuals were okay, but there's much better free stuff on YouTube and in Meta TV.  Much better. The "science" behind the visuals is not really science at all - just poetic interpretations.  The graphics are also more metaphorical to some degree rather than an attempt to truly visualise the evolution of the Universe.  I'd say just save your money... there's much better free content.
Wow never have I seen something so amazing , I’m a big lover of science I felt like I was in space. This is something I wish I could have seen in my childhood it would have changed my whole world

reviews.review_title: Fancy lights, some sound tests, as demo
reviews.review_description: I would rather send money directly to Neil deGrasse Tyson instead.

Just a recommendation, please add a Meditative mode, where i could just stay in one the environments with ambient music in the background. I would gladly pay extra $15.00 for that experience added as DLC.

I bought it because  Darren Aronofsky (ex. Producer) was involved in this project and I am a big fan of his work. Unfortunately I can't recommend this one. Spheres was boring and uninspiring, the visuals are outdated and the narration wasn't memorable either. The whole experience lasts around 40minutes and after watching it once I'm not touching it again. If you want a space experience go for space explorers.
My headset is English but when I started this app it only shows Japanese.  How do I change to english?

I've only had my Quest 2 for a few weeks, and I didn't have any prior models, so I am super new to the whole VR thing, but this one is my favorite so far. It's less educational than I expected, but then, I lovelovelove space, so it was information I've heard before. I do wish there was more content, and maybe the ability to free travel as well as more interaction, and maybe the ability to skip through the credits as they play for each chapter. But all in all, I think its absolutely stunning.
Great visuals but they make you wait so long watching the contributions.

reviews.review_title: The Best Ive seen in Oculus
reviews.review_description: Mindblowing xperience!
I love this app and it would be great to have more. The concept and the music. The person narrating , it’s all a very pleasant and beautiful experience.
I thought this was a magnificent piece of VR art. 4 out of 5 because I wanted a little more interaction and it was too short!!! Would love to expand this type of experience!
If you’re into Astronomy, this is a must app! Highly recommend ￼
I Loved it!
Spheres is a beautifully presented cosmic experience to be enjoyed by the whole family.
